mapper.sql: id, order_id, menu_id, menu_name, quantity, unit_price, subtotal, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM order_items WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_items (order_id, menu_id, menu_name, quantity, unit_price, subtotal, created_at) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{menuId}, #{menuName}, #{quantity}, #{unitPrice}, #{subtotal}, #{createdAt})

INSERT INTO order_items (order_id, menu_id, menu_name, quantity, unit_price, subtotal, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.orderId}, #{item.menuId}, #{item.menuName}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.unitPrice}, #{item.subtotal}, #{item.createdAt})
